case_title: JOHN FELIX BAZOUNGOULA VS. ATEF AZIZ SHAHID

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-12-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAHID, ATEF AZIZ (DRIVER)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZOUNGOULA, JOHN FELIX AS TO DEFENDANT SHAHID, ATEF AZIZ (DRIVER)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY BAZOUNGOULA, JOHN FELIX AS TO DEFENDANT SHAHID, ATEF AZIZ (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE AMENDING HIS CLAIM TO ADD HODA SENTE SHAHID AS PARTY DEFT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZOUNGOULA, JOHN FELIX

AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY BAZOUNGOULA, JOHN FELIX AS TO DEFENDANT SHAHID, ATEF AZIZ (DRIVER) SHAHID, HODA SENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAZOUNGOULA, JOHN FELIX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHAHID, ATEF AZIZ (DRIVER) SHAHID, HODA SENTE ALTHOUGH THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE DEFENDANT WAS AT FAULT FOR THE SUBJECT COLLISION, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE COLLISION CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
